info.name: 360Ghar Virtual Tours & AI API
info.description:
Complete API collection for 360Ghar Virtual Tours and AI-powered features.

## Overview
This collection provides endpoints for creating and managing immersive 360 virtual tours with AI-powered enhancements.

## Features
- **Virtual Tours**: Create, manage, and publish 360 virtual tours
- **Scenes**: Add panoramic scenes to tours with customizable settings
- **Hotspots**: Add interactive navigation and info hotspots
- **Floor Plans**: Upload floor plans with scene markers
- **AI Services**: Automated scene analysis, hotspot suggestions, and description generation
- **Analytics**: Track tour views, engagement, and heatmaps
- **Public Access**: Share tours publicly with QR codes and embed options

## Authentication
All endpoints (except Public Access) require a Bearer token from Supabase Auth.

## Setup Instructions:
1. Import this collection into Postman
2. Import the environment variables
3. Obtain a Supabase access token and set `access_token` in environment
4. Set `test_tour_id`, `test_scene_id`, `test_hotspot_id`, `test_floor_plan_id`, and `test_ai_job_id` as you create resources

## API Modules:
- **Tours**: CRUD operations, publishing, duplication, analytics
- **Scenes**: Scene management within tours
- **Hotspots**: Interactive hotspot management
- **Floor Plans**: Floor plan upload and marker management
- **Dashboard**: User statistics and realtime metrics
- **Public Access**: Unauthenticated endpoints for viewing published tours
- **AI Services**: AI-powered analysis, generation, and optimization

query.description: Filter by status: draft | published | archived

request.description: List all tours for the current user with optional filtering by status and search.
Create a new virtual tour in draft status. Add scenes and hotspots before publishing.
Get a tour by ID with all scenes and hotspots. Returns the complete tour structure.
Update a tour's details including title, description, settings, and other properties.
Delete a tour (soft delete). The tour is marked as deleted but not permanently removed.
Publish a tour to make it publicly accessible. Sets the tour status to 'published'.
Unpublish a tour to make it private again. Sets the tour status back to 'draft'.
Duplicate an existing tour including all scenes and hotspots. The new tour will be in draft status.
Get analytics data for a tour including view counts, engagement metrics, device breakdown, and daily views.
Generate a QR code for the tour URL. Returns a PNG image that links to the public tour page.
Get aggregated heatmap data for a tour. Returns heatmap points grouped by scene for visualization of user interaction patterns.
List all scenes for a tour. Returns scenes ordered by their order_index.
Add a new scene to a tour. The scene will be added at the end of the tour's scene list.
Reorder scenes within a tour. Provide the scene IDs in the desired order.
Get a scene by ID with all its hotspots.
Update a scene's details including title, description, image URLs, and metadata.
Delete a scene from a tour. This will also delete all hotspots associated with the scene.
List all hotspots for a scene. Returns hotspots ordered by their order_index.

body.raw:
{
  "type": "navigation",
  "position": {
    "yaw": 45.5,
    "pitch": -5.0,

  },

request.description: Add a new hotspot to a scene. Hotspots can be navigation links, info popups, or media elements.
Get a hotspot by ID.
Update a hotspot's properties. Can update type, position, target scene, title, description, icon, and custom data.
Delete a hotspot from a scene.
Update only the position of a hotspot. This is a convenience endpoint for drag-and-drop positioning in the editor.
List all floor plans for a tour. Returns floor plans ordered by floor number.

exec: console.log('Floor plan created with ID:', response.id);

request.description: Create a new floor plan for a tour. Floor plans can include an image and markers that link to scenes.
Get a floor plan by ID.
Update a floor plan's properties including name, image URL, floor number, and markers.
Update only the markers on a floor plan. This is a convenience endpoint for marker placement in the editor.
Delete a floor plan from a tour.
Get dashboard statistics for the current user including total tours, published tours, total views, total scenes, and storage usage.
Get realtime analytics metrics for the current user's tours including active sessions, views/likes/shares in the last hour, and average session duration.
Get a publicly accessible tour by ID. This endpoint is used by the public viewer and embed page. The tour must be published and public.
Get all scenes for a publicly accessible tour. Returns scenes ordered by order_index with their hotspots.

Track an analytics event for a public tour. Event types: view, scene_view, hotspot_click, share, fullscreen_enter, fullscreen_exit, vr_enter, vr_exit, heatmap, session_start, session_end, like, unlike.
Increment the like count for a public tour.
Decrement the like count for a public tour.

exec: console.log('AI Job created with ID:', response.job.id);

request.description: Analyze all scenes in a tour using AI. Detects room types, suggests titles/descriptions, and evaluates image quality. Returns a job ID for tracking progress.

exec: console.log('AI Tour Generation started. Job ID:', response.job.id, 'Tour ID:', response.tour_id);

formdata.value: Tour automatically generated from uploaded 360 images

request.description: Generate a new tour from uploaded 360 images using AI. Accepts multipart/form-data with image files. Images are processed to detect room types, generate titles/descriptions, and optionally suggest hotspot placements.
Optimize an existing tour using AI suggestions.
Analyze a single scene using AI. Returns room type, suggested title/description, and quality assessment.
Get AI-suggested hotspots for a scene. Analyzes the panorama to suggest optimal navigation and info hotspot placements.
Get AI-suggested hotspots for all scenes in a tour. Analyzes all panoramas and suggests navigation hotspots to connect scenes.
Generate AI description for a scene. Creates a compelling description based on the panorama content. Options: tone (professional/casual/luxury/friendly), length (short/medium/long).
Generate AI descriptions for all scenes in a tour. Creates descriptions for each scene based on panorama content.

query.description: Filter by status: pending | processing | completed | failed | cancelled

request.description: List AI processing jobs for the current user. Returns jobs with optional status filtering and pagination.
Get the status and result of an AI processing job. Returns the job details including progress and results if completed.
Cancel a running AI processing job. Only pending or processing jobs can be cancelled.
Apply AI scene analysis suggestions to scenes. Updates scene titles and descriptions based on selected suggestions.
Apply AI hotspot suggestions to a scene. Creates hotspots based on the selected suggestion IDs.
